titleStmt.title: SII 23.160: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 160. (A.R. No. 160 of 1907.) Pēraiyūr, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Nāganāthasvāmi temple—on the same wall Māṟ. Sundara-Pāṅḍya I: year 13: 1228-29 A.D.

summary.p: This is a record of Māṟavarman Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva (I) ‘who was pleased to present the Chōḷa Country’. It is partly damaged. It seems to register the lease of a waste land (nattappāḻ) belonging to the temple, for the formation of a street called the Kulaśēkharapperunderuvu with the rental (maṉaiyīṟai) fixed at 3/8 kāśu per year on every plot measuring 3 kōl by 7 by the standard measuring rod known as the Iḍaiyarkōl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ komāṟapaṟmarāṉa coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya śrīsundarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3vatu tiru
pperaiyūr Uṭaiyār tirunāgīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar Aruḷāl tevarkaṉmikaḷ
kāṇi cikāriyañ ceyvār nāṭṭukkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷom I nāyaṉār tevatāṉattu kulacekarapperunteruvāka Eṟa caṇṭeśvarap
peruvilaiyāka viṟṟa nattattukkellai kiḻpāṟkellai Innāyaṉār teva tāṉam Aruḷcāntanallūrār pakkal caṇṭeśvarapperuvilaiyāka
k koṇṭu nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkaṟkaḷukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai tiruccūlakkallukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai civagaṅkaikiḻ
karaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kollaṉ Aruḷpeṟṟāṉ vayakkal kottan nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icaitta peru
nāṉkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nattapāḻil licainta vilaipporuḷukku caṇ ṭeśvara peruvilaiyāka viṟṟukuṭutta Inattattuk
Iṭaiyaṟkkolāl mukkolukku Eḻukolāka vanta maṉai Oṉṟukku Āṇṭoṉṟukku maṉaiyiṟai kālearaikka
kācu Arai c conikki koḷvomākavum Innattattilp piḻaikkac ceytāruṇṭākil tirumaṭai viḷākattey taṇ
The inscription stops here incomplete. Below this however are four lines in later characters which do not form part of the above record.

niṉṟu nakarattār coṉ ṅ koḷvomākavum Innakarattāṟku viparitamākayiruppār tirupperaiyūr nāṉkellai
kaṭavarallavākavum ḷḷiṭṭatellām koyiṟṟamar mukattāl nalpuṭaril
pokkaṟuppomākavum kūṭi cammatittu ku nakarattāṟku muṉ peṟṟa tevarkaṉmi
heśvarakaṇkāṇi śrī kāriyañ ce nakaram paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
